code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut start = 0
mut found = false
mut result = ""

while i < n and not found
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  match b_opt
  when Some(b)
    if b == 10
      let line = string.substring(input, start, i)
      let trimmed = string.trim(line)
      if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
        result = trimmed
        found = true
      end
      start = i + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not found and start < n
  let line = string.substring(input, start, n)
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
    result = trimmed
    found = true
  end
end

if found
  println(result)
else
  println("(none)")
end
